reviews.review_text: Great holiday park with amazing amenities

This holiday park is fantastic. The facilities are really well maintained - always clean and stocked with TP and soap. We had a small child with us so they gave us fob access to a family shower room also which was super. There are laundry facilities which we used twice and they are very reasonably priced with detergent available for a dollar in the little shop. The camp ground (we had a tent) plots are very generous with space and lovely soft grass. The staff in the reception were lovely and really accommodating to our needs. We loved this little haven! Thank you!
We were here on a recent trip and we found it a bit disappointing that the beds only get changed every 5 days but also the fact that we had to ask for new towels as ours were drenched and dirty.

This caravan park is a 10/10 |Amazing sites |Bathrooms and camp kitchens very clean and tidy|Walk across to a beautiful beach but unpatrolled beach! |The staff were incredible very welcoming and friendly. |We will definitely be back!

One of the best places if not the best to camp with family. We keep coming back every single year, and it never stops to amaze us .|Every friend that tries it, just fall in love with the place.|Highly recommended

Great holiday as always and we sincerely hate leaving this beautiful place every year  . The staff , management and even the Coffee at Aunties Cafe is Platinum’ 👌|Toilets and amenities always clean , no negatives . |Thanks for having us Team , see you all soon ! |Easter Warriors’

Brilliant location. So close to the beautiful Broken Head beach with its surf and white sand. We originally had booked a caravan site for 4 nights but after seeing the great amenities block and the overall grounds we extended to 7 nights. Caravan sites are tight but we had no problems with our overall 26 foot length caravan on the hill. The grounds are meticulously kept by the groundsman who also doubled as main amenities cleaner and overall handyman. Excellent work.|Thank you to the whole administration team and we will definitely be back.
Fantastic... Great Reception team..always happy to assist... or lend an ear to my nattering... awesome facilities.. Andybuh is a legend!!! Cant wait to come back!!! Thanks a zillion
Staff were friendly and very helpful. The place is beautiful. The amenities are looked after extremely well. I will be back every year.
Took our caravan. Small park, clean modern amenities, at the beach, headland walks, morning coffees and food from trailer cafe. Will return for sure.

Such a beautiful location. How can you not have a wonderful time here.
There is so much to explore. Lovely facility and accommodating staff willing to help when needed.
I will be back.

Excellent location 200metres to gorgeous beach. Cabins are average  with dated kitchen and bathroom but bedding and sheets are fresh and new.  Only 1 car allowed per cabin so other cars need to park in nearby national park - it’s very close but hard to get a park there on weekends. Buy a national park pass for broken head - it’s cheaper than paying for daily parking at $22 for a year.
Beautiful caravan park, well maintained. Brilliant spot 1min walk to beach and easy 10min drive to Byron bay. Maintenance guy is a legend (sorry never got your name)

We stayed on a powered site for 3 nights. The amenities (showers & toilets) were excellent, some of the best we have seen. The sites were all just a bit uneven, requiring wheel chocks. The food van near reception was a welcome extra. The only downside was the old style open dump point.

Broken Head Holiday Park was a real treat. Excellent location right near the beach and the walk out to the Head is a great morning starter. The amenities are very clean and modern, has a good laundry with a drier. The sites are level and tidy with beautiful rainforest surrounding the park. Reception was wonderful and so easy on arrival. Great value for money will be back. Thank you.
Totally awesome with v clean amenities and beachfront
We love Brokenhead holiday park. It's our home away from home. Staff is super nice, facilities are good. Park is clean and 1 minute walk from the beach

What a great location just minutes from a lovely beach that's great for kids to swim and play. It's also very popular with surfers. I walked the track to the headland.

The staff were super friendly and helpful. The facilities were well maintained and the amenities block, laundry room and camp kitchen area were clean and tidy. I was very impressed and thought it was good value for the price.

An amazing place to just chill, right near the surf and not far from Byron or Lennox. The place is really well maintained and the toilets and communal facilities were spotless I’ll be back for sure!!!
Bloody good spot!
Just a 2 minute walk from the beach. Clean facilities, shady camping spots and the coffee truck is great as well.

We have only used the campground with our camper van and I am happy with the modern amenities and they are kept in good condition by the staff.
The location is beautiful, just on the edge of national park and reserve, pretty beach. And close to Byron and Lennox.
And their camping prices are very fair for what you get. Other campgrounds could learn something (some Nrma places ask $100 a night and have old amenities)

Worst service I’ve ever got in any holidays park in Australia
Bad service at reception
Amazing spot. Beautiful breezes and shady caravan parks. The showers were better than we have at home. Could see the Byron lighthouse from our campsite.

The location is unbeatable, just a short stroll to the stunning Broken Head beach and surrounded by peaceful rainforest. Waking up to the sound of the ocean never gets old. Whether you’re walking the tracks, surfing, or simply relaxing by the beach, it’s the perfect getaway.
Nice and lovely place to spend the arvo.

What a beautiful part of the world so lucky to be able to stay here and share in its beauty, the campgrounds are well kept,  the facilities are so clean and well looked after, it’s testament to the management of how much they care for the patrons and their surroundings,
Highly recommend this serenely ticked away gem

Great service at reception upon entry. Sign the contract to clean the room before checking out and promised not to sublet the room, lol. The room, Deluxe King Beach Shack, is not a good description. A few issues. First up, the only DELUX thing was the bed was the size of a king, however. It was just two single mattresses stitched together. Not to bad for comfort, but to have a hard seem down the middle, this is not DELUX. The room was not clean. We had to clean it ourselves. On the top of the microwave was dirt and dust, we had to clean the sand out of inside of the only cupboard in the room for clothes and the floor was covered with sand. There was no broom or dust pan and brush provided to sweep the floor. So we always had sand on our feet. We had not been to the beach at all before we arrived or even during our stay,  so it was not from our feet. Aircon was good, so 1 star is all we can give. Would not recommend this place based on these issues. (See attached pics) for our 30th anniversary we were very disappointed. A stain on the small couch and damage to the sink cabinet were also disappointing. These would embarrass me, being a business owner myself, would not be something I would leave for a review to expose. The pics provided of the room was of another cabin which was more spacious and deceived us. Not very happy, as we feel the price was just not worth it. The location probably saves this park from bad reviews. Sorry, we are not dazzled by just where it is located.

We stayed 2 nights in a campervan, powered site, $57 a night. A quiet site with helpful staff.
The location is amazing, a couple of minutes walk to the beach. Amenities clean and modern and the on site van selling food opens at 7am until 2pm, great fish & chips and burgers!
Location is amazing, caravan park is good, amenities were clean, will come back.
Good facilities, fantastic beach and surrounding area, price was reasonable, vibe was good, highly recommended by us.

Fabulous camping site, IMO the best around here. I was very "dissapointed" with one woman on reception blonde hair and tatoos, who was less than helpful and argumentative. To say she is lacking in customer service skills would be an understatement. Bronwyn and the other lady were exceptionally nice and helpful. If you have a similar problem please complain as she ruined my day/trip.
Beautiful clean holiday park, lovely toilets and showers. Great camp kitchen. Quiet location, lovely headland. Highly recommend.
Not too big a park which I like. Reasonably flat sites. Modern bathroom facilities with a good shower. Good camp stitched. Close to the beach.
Lovely small caravan park beside a beautiful beach. Perfect spot to chill out for a few days
Great location, amenities are great and kept clean. Nice quiet hideaway.
Again in 2025, This is a beautiful park, in my top 3 from years of camping. Very helpful and friendly staff. Great camp kitchen and the amenities are modern and spotless.

Le personnel ets très gentil.|Les emplacements sont bons et surtout la plage est vraiment à côté.|Possibilité de faire une marche et bien sûre du surf.|✨✨✨✨✨✨✨✨✨✨✨✨✨✨✨✨✨✳️✳️✳️✳️✳️✳️✳️✳️✳️✳️✳️✳️✳️✳️✳️✳️✳️✳️✳️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️😘😘❤️
Awesome location great staff.
A great place to be. 1 minutes easy walk to the best beach. Close to Byron

Advertised as a campsite up to 6 people. But campsites are very tiny, should be advertised as for 2 people only or asvertised as for 1 tent only!
We bearly fitted two tents, and one was on a slope! As space was so tiny we had to take some space from the neigbours.
Gravel underneath which caused hole in the tent floor.
Reception was bit rude too.
Also they did not allow a friend to drive in to set up their tent eventhough there was enough space to drive in for 30min and then leave, and they had to carry everything from the national park carpark space.
Expensive. We paid almost $550 for 4 nights and there was bearly a space plus $22 for carpark.

We have got only 1 toilet tag for 4 people....

Good things: clean, great location, nice bathrooms and kitchen area with hot water. Good facilities for kids.

Exceptional service! My friends and I had booked 5 days at a powered site and unfortunately our gazebo and tent broke in some heavy rainfall. We called the emergency number as it was past closing time and the owners were very accomodating and super quick to book us in a cabin that was available. Will definitely be staying here again.

Love our Easter at Broken Head , it’s an annual tradition for our family + others and it never disappoints . The staff , managers always make us welcome !! Toilets and showers always clean and the site prepped.
Thanks so much🤘
Schöner und kleiner Campingplatz direkt am Meer.

We stayed in the powered caravan site with an 8 metre caravan, great set up and amazing spot to take the family for a getaway.
Feels like you are away from the big city but with the convenience of Suffolk park 5min away to stock up on anything you need. Byron is also only 10min up the road.
Low tide bike ride up the beach to the cape Byron lookout was a highlight. Definitely recommend..
can’t say anything more than booked for one week and stayed for four weeks.what a fantastic little park.  this will be an annual event for us now.

What a Fantastic place to stay. One of the cleanest best kept Parks we've ever stayed in. The Office Staff are brilliant, as are the People on the ground on the mowers, blowers, Cleaners etc. We'll definitely be back, and already telling our Friends it's a must visit destination. The beach at your doorstep is an added bonus. Thanks so much for having us there! Peter & Michelle Ling.
One of the best i ve been. Staying in broken its amazing, great spot. Camped there for a week. Take your rain tarp.
Great part of the world.
Beautiful location. It’s like being in the middle of the jungle.
Pool and private bungalow with ensuite bathroom and veranda. The owner Phillip is very friendly. 20 minute walk to the beach. The price was great for the time I was there.

We stayed on one of the powered campervan/caravan sights and had a very pleasant time.

The amenities are absolutely fantastic (modern and very well taken care of) and the beach is phenomenal.

Would love to go back.

We have been staying here for 29 years, and absolutely love the location. The reception staff are always unbelievably rude and unhappy, and treat the guests appallingly. I keep approaching them with kindness hoping maybe they will reciprocate- but still no avail. Very disappointing. I recommend a late check in to avoid them.

I've stayed at this place twice before, but this visit was a disaster due to the appalling attitude of the staff. The woman at reception was unbelievably rude, cutting me off mid-sentence and acting like she was doing me a favor just for checking me in. When I asked if they sold bread at the shop, her dismissive and condescending response made me wish I hadn’t asked at all. As if that wasn’t enough, there was a man constantly driving around in a club car, staring at us, and doing laps around the campsite. His behavior made me feel extremely uncomfortable, like we were being monitored for no reason. The facilities were also below standard. The fridge was filthy, and the fobs were so gross I didn’t even want to touch them. It’s such a shame to see this place decline so much, especially with staff that clearly don’t care about being respectful to their guests. Definitely won’t be coming back.
Lovely place to stay beautiful beach and amenities are excellent

We stayed for two nights on a powered tent site and really enjoyed it. Amenities where 10/10. Very modern and clean. Staff were friendly and easy access. Our only suggestion is some of the tent sites have large gravel as the base. Maybe cover them with Weed Matting and some hard sand or road base. We’ll be back in any case but that would make those sites much easier to be on.
Don’t even want to put 1 star never talk to people so rude never go there EVER ! Don’t worth to waste money on places where people are not welcoming ! Many places around !

For 46$, we were really close to other campervan ..
After that amnesties are great, staff is nice

I stayed here on the 30th July, 2024 for three nights, on a powered caravan site. After the second night I extended my booking for one night. The boom gate failed to open on entry after the booking was amended. The exact same thing happened the previous time I stayed at this park several months ago. Previously, the staff were apologetic and stated that the system was due to be upgraded. Unfortunately, this time the staff in the office accused me of not entering the code on departure. I attempted to explain that I definitely did enter the code however they were disrespectful and condescending. They spoke over me, cut me off mid-sentence and refused to hear me. Their tone, words and mannerisms were indicative of their unacceptable behaviour. I was polite, professional and respectful at all times and this can be evidenced by the video footage.
I asked who the park owners were and they stated that they were the owners. I was well aware that this was a misrepresentation of the truth and on further questioning, they stated that the park was owned by an indigenous organisation. They refused to give me contact details and suggested that I direct written communication to them. Hence this review!
Beautiful Beach a wonderful place to stay for family's
I was verbally abused with homophobic slurs yelled in my face by a patron for no reason.  While the campsite is paradise, I would be careful with your family around here.
Camping as close to the beach as possible. We've got a powered site - it's great
Best camping ground, not too populated and beautiful views 🥰
Fabulous beach and bush walks

We just had a great 3 weeks.  Beautiful beaches , long beach.
and headland walks . Good fishing . Staff always a smile.  Amenities spotless.  The Park is looking amazing thanks to  Glenn . Will be back . Love Broken Head

We stayed here for one night on our travels between Sydney and brisbane we where so impressed we stayed 3 nights in our hired camper ...its a stone throw from beach .amenities are spotless ..staff fantastic...best campground we went to between Sydney and brisbane..great beach awesome walks
We definitely coming back on next trip from New Zealand
Thanks crew for a great stay 🙂👌

I am very disappointed with the service and poor communication provided by staff. I have tried to make contact several times to book campsites (email, then phone calls), only to have all calls ignored/no answer, no returned calls, and email to confirm the booking deposit was not responded to. Unfortunately, we will now be taking our business elsewhere since the campground is clearly not interested in providing accommodation or taking bookings.

I have previously camped at Broken Head and had great experiences due to location and cleanliness of the campground, so this has been a very disappointing and unprofessional experience.

Hello everybody, I was here in June last year, it was my first holiday in Australia from Barcelona and I sincerely think that the campsite has a perfect location, the facilities are incredible considering that is a campsite, clean, tidy, I felt safe at all times and even though I was in a In a place without electricity, I was able to charge the phone battery and I remember that there was a refrigerator in case we had to store any food or drinks. In general, we were well taken care of by the staff, so there was nothing negative to say about it. Outside the campsite there is a food truck that prepares some great sandwiches.
I’m looking to back today or tomorrow in this second visit.
Catalans que esteu per Byron Bay, aquest lloc és ideal per passar la nit i fer passeigs per platges paradisíaques, sincerament molt recomanable, 👍🏼
Absolute joke!! Don't even bother trying! Called them all day long and wrote emails just TRYING to book a spot - no answers! Just to arrive to a closed gate and noone there

Seemed nice when I turned up. Setting was lovely, management was a very different story. Overbooked, underprepared, and instead of dealing with a complaint the owner decided to scream in a patrons face. Not a great place for families with the owner screaming bloody murder at dinner time. Book with caution…

Unfortunately the management’s behaviour detracted from the reasonable facilities - like the good number of barbecues.
One night, the manager - a grown man - screamed at the top of his voice at other guests whilst the children were sleeping. It seemed very unprofessional and a bit embarrassing for all involved.
I witnessed very aggressive behaviour towards some other guests from the park manager and other members of staff

The manager/owner screamed at us at the top of his voice! This was after dark so he woke up children in surrounding tents. Very unprofessional. Here’s a few reasons not to stay here:
- Shockingly managed - we arrived to find our site had been allocated to someone else. And the management acting like children is embarrassing for them
- ⁠Sites are not suitable for their means - gravel sites allocated to tents and powered sites not big enough for vans
- ⁠One fridge allocated for the whole of the site - it’s completely packed so don’t expect to be able to use it
- ⁠Fob access needed for amenities (one fob was given to share between us)
- ⁠Most expensive holiday park we’ve stayed at in Australia ($75 per night for an unpowered site for a small 2-person tent!) and it’s been the worst for us so far

One of our favourite places on our travels around Australia so far, very relaxed being right on the beach, away from the hustle and bustle of Byron yet close enough to go in for dinner etc. Lovely spacious grassy camp sites not over crowded and very clean amenities. There is also a lovely walk track over the hill and a great long beach to walk along!
What an awesome location, great clean amenities, fantastic staff & Aunties Cafe does an excellent Egg & Bacon roll.....and all right on the beach 👍👍👍👍👍👍
Great place to stay very friendly and helpful and the place itself is awesome . Look forward to our next trip .
3rd year in a row. See you next year!

I came here with my family. I camped with a swag and gazebo. My parents have a caravan and my sister stayed in a beach shack. The room was small,  bed is comfy although the bed is joined together and is very hard in the middle. The lots for camping are fairly small, gravely and hilly. When trying to call the park every time me or my family member did we got voice mail. They were helpful once you leave a message and do call back. Dump point is not on map and isn’t very clearly marked. The lots are very close together and does feel crowded although we visited during a busy time. Amenities are wonderful. I have never seen camp showers or toilets so nice before. Clean, warm showers. The location is top notch and is away from the hustle and bustle of Byron but close enough to visit. It can get very windy so do make sure you have the equipment to anchor your camp down.
Great camp ,good sites , beautiful beaches

Clean and simple shack. Great if you're only staying a couple of nights, and don't own a caravan. Beds were not comfortable. I say beds as I stayed in a shack that had two single beds and both beds had a massive divot in the middle.
Had my own caravan.  What a top spot. Great hiking seeing whales and dolphins. Wallabies and bird life.  Stuff beyond bay stay here
Stunning location. Great for walks or hanging out at the beach. The site is well maintained and facilities look to be fairly new. This would be in my top 3 camp sites in northern NSW.

I only deliver stationery products there. From what I have observed,  it is a clean well laid out park within walking distance of the beach.  It would be well worth considering for a quiet relaxing holiday
The best!

When making a reservation at this camping site, be sure to inform the staff about the dimensions of your tent, so they can assign a spot that perfectly accommodates your needs. One of the reasons I adore this camping site is its proximity to the beach, just a few meters away. Nestled far from main roads, it offers tranquility, with the sound of the ocean being the only audible background. The cleanliness of the toilet and kitchen facilities truly surprised me - you won't believe your eyes
Tent only. Facilities are pristine.
